close_reason: Added nodejs/typescript to registry. Buck2 prelude lacks native TS toolchain, so these are marked skip=true. Can be used via genrule.
description:
TypeScript: add toolchain mapping

FINDING: Buck2 bundled prelude does not have a system_typescript_toolchain.
The js/ directory provides js_library and js_bundle rules, but they require:
- A worker tool (Node.js based)
- Custom setup for the worker_runner

OPTIONS:
1. Use genrule-based TypeScript compilation (simple but not native)
2. Create custom TypeScript toolchain rules (complex)
3. Defer TypeScript support until Buck2 adds native support

RECOMMENDATION: Use genrule approach for now to demonstrate integration,
document that full TypeScript support would require additional work.
title: TypeScript: add toolchain mapping
